local only
ZERO TELEMETRY. LOCAL ONLY.
reading ~/.agents/.claude-code-usage-report/state/stats.csv …generated 2026-07-16 23:17:07

Read straight from your own session logs: every dollar, token, and working hour, itemized below. Nothing leaves your disk.

Usage roadmap

what could come next
Roadmap
availablePrompt patternshistory.jsonl present — add prompt-length distribution, prompts/session, and think-time between prompts (when in the day you're most productive).
availableTask completion41 TaskCreate todo lists in ~/.claude/tasks — add a todo completion-rate stat (done vs abandoned per session).
availableFile churn338 file-history snapshots — surface most-edited files/repos and real churn, independent of statusline line counts.
availableResponse latencyTranscript message timestamps support a think-time vs generation-time split per session.
partialLOC coveragelines added/removed present for 199/638 sessions (31%); $/line is now cost-scoped to line-bearing rows and shown as '—' below 5% coverage. Value still firms up as more sessions record via the statusline.
partialActive-time tracking$/hour now uses an active-time proxy (cost>0 sessions, per-session duration uncapped — legit sessions can exceed 8h) instead of raw transcript wall-clock span, which counted idle/hung sessions (e.g. 577h @ $0). The $0-cost filter alone drops idle/hung sessions; proxy still underestimates real hourly cost because idle is distributed within billed sessions; a true fix needs turn-level active-time capture in the statusline, not transcript span.
partialRate-limit utilizationrl_5h_pct / rl_7d_pct now charted (utilization %, throttle-safety >80%/100%, spend per 7d%-point at peak). Forward-only from the statusline rate_limits field (Claude Code v2.1.80+, Claude.ai Pro/Max only — absent for API-key/Bedrock/Vertex and some Max 20x oauth users). Coverage grows as sessions record; efficient-use judgment firms up once a full 7-day window is captured.
doneRate-limit forecastEmpirical-Bayes forecast (claumon MODEL v2.1 port, forecast.mjs) projects each gauge to its reset boundary with an 80% credible interval + ETA-to-threshold, fit from OAuth usage-snapshots; prior-only statusline-rl fallback when OAuth is off. `stats.mjs forecast [--force]` prints/forces the fit (state/forecast.json).
donePrior calibrationOut-of-sample audit of the percentile cost priors (Phase E): hold out the most recent ~20% of cost-calibrated ops per category, refit p50/p90, score coverage / bias / pinball. Printed by `priors` (p90 cov / bias columns) and `estimate` (OOS calibration row); p90 coverage < 0.70 flagged as unreliable.
doneLive pricing refreshLayered pricing (Phase F): embedded PRICE → 24h cache (state/pricing-cache.json, from `fetch-pricing --oauth`) → time-bounded PROMOS → manual pricing.json override. Sonnet 5 intro $2/$10 reflected via PROMOS through 2026-08-31. `fetch-pricing --oauth` pulls claumon's remote, reduces model-ids to family keys; `pricing` prints the resolved table.
doneSubagent tokens in est costPhase G: est_cost_usd (no-billed sessions) now folds in subagent-run transcript tokens, summed per assistant message with _msg_cost_tiered. The isSidechain skip is scoped to the main transcript (subagent files are themselves the sidechain). Billed sessions unchanged; priors still calibrate on billed only.
doneEB shrinkage in estimatePhase H: small-n category cost priors are shrunk toward a cross-category grand mean (FC.fitPrior between-category variance + normal-normal conjugacy; shift scaled by per-category withinVar/n). Stored per category as `shrink`; `estimate` prints a `shrunk (EB, small-n)` row when n_cost < 20. Large-n categories keep raw (data-weight≈1).
doneActive-session detectionPhase I: report excludes the mid-flight session via cost-state freshness (statusline rewrites cost-state/<sid>.json per render; fresh <900s = live) instead of the old 180s transcript-mtime window, which mislabeled a paused-but-live session as closed and folded its incomplete transcript in. Stale lingering cost-state (hook-missed) still folds in; 180s transcript-mtime fallback kept for the no-statusline case.
availableStatusline archive367 sessions archived in sessions.jsonl — mine rate-limit % and context-fullness trends next.
ideaReport UXAdd a date-range filter, a session search box, sortable tables, and CSV/PNG export.
ideaReport UXPer-project filter mirroring the model filter; drill from a project into its sessions.
ideaCross-toolReconcile against other AI-coding spend trackers (e.g. CodeBurn, agent-insights) for spend across Copilot, Cursor, Codex, if you use any.
Generated locally from ~/.agents/.claude-code-usage-report/state/stats.csv. All session data stays on this machine. Line counts, API time and rate-limit data are captured from the statusline going forward; older sessions show them as 0/—. Tool usage, projects, subagents, skills and compactions are derived from transcripts (retroactive). Run /claude-code-usage-report-suggestions for the roadmap as text.
Top
